'''Pypin''' was one of the [[Trianii/Legends|Trianii]] colony worlds<ref name="HSCS" /> within the disputed border of the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|51|Pypin}}</ref>
